pages.title: MindStudio — Repository Overview
pages.purpose: High-level introduction to the MindStudio master documentation repository: what it is, how it is organized into two major toolchains (Operator Development and Inference/Training), the Ascend hardware context, and how to navigate the wiki. Links to all major child sections.

pages.title: Getting Started & Quick Start Guides
pages.purpose: Consolidated entry point for new users: environment prerequisites (CANN, PyTorch, MindSpore versions), installation overview, and pointers to each tool's quick-start guide. Covers msIT quick start, msOT quick start, and the individual tool quick-start documents.

pages.title: Release Notes & Version History
pages.purpose: Aggregated release notes for all tools in the master release. Covers new features, compatibility matrices (CANN, PyTorch, MindSpore), and links to per-tool changelogs.

pages.title: Legal, Licensing & Security
pages.purpose: Covers the CC BY 4.0 documentation license, MulanPSL-2.0 source license, security statements, vulnerability handling procedures, and disclaimers that apply across all tools in the repository.

pages.title: Operator Development Toolchain (msOT)
pages.purpose: Overview of the Ascend operator development toolchain (msOT). Introduces the end-to-end workflow: design → build → verify → detect → debug → profile. Links to child pages for each tool. References the msOT README and fullview diagram.

pages.title: msDebug — Ascend C Operator Debugger
pages.purpose: Overview of msDebug, the LLDB-based on-board debugger for Ascend C kernels. Introduces its two modes (live debugging and coredump analysis), supported operator types (Vector/Cube/Mix), and links to child pages for architecture, usage, and development.

pages.title: msDebug Architecture & Internal Design
pages.purpose: Deep dive into msDebug's internal architecture: ProcessElfCoreDevice, CommandObjectAscend, the Ascend ELF coredump format (.ascend.regs, .ascend.local, .ascend.global sections), live debugging lifecycle (runtime_stub, rtKernelLaunch interception, TSFW), and security validation. Includes architecture diagrams.

pages.title: msDebug Usage Guide & Best Practices
pages.purpose: Practical guide to using msDebug: CLI invocation modes (fatbin, ACL, PyTorch), breakpoint management, variable inspection (LocalTensor/GlobalTensor), memory read commands (-m UB / -m GM), core switching (ascend aiv/aic), Catlass/template library debugging, and environment variables (LAUNCH_KERNEL_PATH).

pages.title: msDebug Build System & Contribution Guide
pages.purpose: Developer guide for building msDebug from source: build.py one-click build, step-by-step cmake/ninja workflow, download_dependencies.py, Super Build with makeself packaging, unit test execution, and contribution workflow.

pages.title: msSanitizer — Operator Anomaly Detection
pages.purpose: Documents msSanitizer, the Ascend operator anomaly detection tool. Covers its four detection modes (memory bounds, data race, uninitialized access, synchronization), API reference (sanitizer + msTX extension APIs), typical cases, and integration with msOpCom.

pages.title: msOpProf — Operator Performance Profiler
pages.purpose: Documents msOpProf, the Ascend operator performance profiling tool. Covers msOpProf mode (on-board) and msOpProf simulator mode, key performance metrics, output files (Pipe_statistic CSV, Instruction_statistic CSV, trace JSON), and typical profiling cases.

pages.title: msKPP — Kernel Performance Prediction
pages.purpose: Documents msKPP (MindStudio Kernel Performance Prediction), the operator performance simulation tool. Covers operator characteristic modeling, pipeline statistics analysis, tiling strategy design, API reference (basic function and instruction interfaces), architecture, and development guide.

pages.title: msOpGen, msOpTuner & msOpCom — Operator Scaffolding Tools
pages.purpose: Covers three supporting operator tools: msOpGen (operator project scaffolding and code generation), msOpTuner (CATLASS tiling parameter search), and msOpCom (shared dynamic instrumentation/hooking infrastructure used by msSanitizer and msOpProf).

pages.title: msTX — Tools Extension Library (Marker API)
pages.purpose: Documents msTX, the lightweight marker/annotation API library. Explains how msTX range markers integrate with msprof (--mstx=on), AscendCL profiling (ACL_PROF_MSPROFTX), and Ascend PyTorch Profiler (mstx=True) to annotate custom time ranges and identify key functions.

pages.title: Inference & Training Toolchain (msIT)
pages.purpose: Overview of the MindStudio Inference Tools (msIT) toolchain for large model and traditional model inference development. Introduces the tool categories (pre-check, quantization, accuracy, performance, monitoring) and links to child pages for each tool.

pages.title: msModelSlim — Model Compression & Quantization
pages.purpose: Documents msModelSlim, the Ascend model compression tool. Covers quantization algorithms (W8A8, W4A8, GPTQ, SmoothQuant, AWQ, SSZ, etc.), one-click quantization, sensitive layer analysis, auto precision tuning, model support matrix (LLM, MoE, multimodal), Python API reference, and integration with MindIE/vLLM Ascend.

pages.title: msProbe — Accuracy Debugging Tool
pages.purpose: Documents msProbe, the full-scenario accuracy debugging toolchain for Ascend. Covers data dump (PyTorch, MindSpore, vLLM, ATB, TorchAir), accuracy comparison (API-level, visualization, offline), overflow detection, checkpoint comparison, monitor mode, and framework-specific guides (training and inference debug guides).

pages.title: Performance Profiling Stack
pages.purpose: Overview of the four-layer performance profiling stack: msProf (data collection), msPTI (profiling API), msprof-analyze (analysis and expert advice), and msTX (markers). Explains how they interoperate and links to child pages for each component.

pages.title: msProf — Performance Data Collection
pages.purpose: Documents msProf (MindStudio Profiler), the CANN-integrated performance data collection tool. Covers the msprof CLI (--output, --application flags), data parsing, profile data file formats, extended functions, and build/install from source.

pages.title: msPTI — Profiler Tools Interface (C/Python API)
pages.purpose: Documents msPTI, the low-level Ascend profiling API library. Covers Activity API (CANN API, Kernel, Memory, HCCL tracing), Callback API (runtime/HCCL hooks), Python API (KernelMonitor, HcclMonitor, MstxMonitor), C/C++ samples, and integration with msMonitor.

pages.title: msprof-analyze — Performance Analysis & Expert Advisor
pages.purpose: Documents msprof-analyze, the post-collection performance analysis tool. Covers cluster analysis (communication bottleneck, PP chart, time summary), expert advisor (automatic issue detection and optimization suggestions), GPU/NPU performance comparison, and the CLI (msprof-analyze cluster/advisor/compare commands).

pages.title: msServiceProfiler — Inference Service Profiling
pages.purpose: Documents msServiceProfiler, the full-stack performance analysis tool for large model inference services (MindIE, vLLM, SGLang). Covers non-intrusive instrumentation, Torch Profiler data collection, OpenTelemetry trace integration, vLLM/SGLang auto-patching, service advisor, automatic parameter optimizer, and Prometheus online monitoring.

pages.title: msMemScope — Memory Profiling & Analysis
pages.purpose: Documents msMemScope, the Ascend memory debugging and optimization tool. Covers memory collection (Python API and CLI modes), memory leak analysis, memory comparison, memory block monitoring, memory decomposition (weights/activations/gradients/optimizer), inefficient memory identification, and the C++ source architecture (framework/event_trace/analysis modules).

pages.title: msMonitor — Cluster Online Monitoring
pages.purpose: Documents msMonitor, the Ascend cluster online performance monitoring and dynamic collection tool. Covers the Dynolog daemon, Dyno CLI (npu-monitor and nputrace commands), MSPTI Monitor integration, Monitor API, MindSpore adapter, and the dynolog_npu module architecture.

pages.title: mstt & msModeling — Training Tools & Modeling
pages.purpose: Documents the MindStudio Training Tools (mstt) umbrella and msModeling. Covers msTransplant (PyTorch-to-NPU migration), Tinker (parallel strategy auto-optimization), bind_core, and msModeling (theoretical performance evaluation and deployment strategy optimization for models and inference services).

pages.title: Contributing to MindStudio Tools
pages.purpose: Unified contribution guide covering the contribution workflow (fork, branch, PR, review), coding standards, development environment setup, compilation, and testing procedures that apply across all tools in the repository.

pages.title: Development Environment & Build Systems
pages.purpose: Covers environment setup for all tools: CANN Toolkit installation, Python/CMake/Ninja prerequisites, download_dependencies.py patterns, cmake super-build vs standard build, makeself packaging, and incremental compilation workflows.

pages.title: Documentation Infrastructure
pages.purpose: Covers the documentation build system used by msMemScope and other tools: ReadTheDocs configuration (.readthedocs.yaml), Sphinx conf.py, custom CSS/JS (mermaid_init.js, right_toc.js, repo_links.js, table_add_class_name.js), requirements.txt, and the communication/issue-reporting guide.

pages.title: Glossary
pages.purpose: Definitions of all codebase-specific terms, abbreviations, hardware concepts, and domain jargon used across the MindStudio master toolchain. Each entry includes code pointers to the relevant tool and file where the term is defined or used.
